_comment: CP-R3 places catalog. Keyed by the canonical world-stack place id. sensoryCue drives the diegetic birth's emergence question (cue -> place); defaultCulture is the onomastics lane a founding here defaults to (may diverge); eraContentDir is the era-tree place dir holding this place's life-arc content; validEras are the era ids a founding here may begin in (cross-ref to eras/index.json). Validated by places.unit.test.ts.

places.label: Ireland
places.sensoryCue: fish and salt air, and a hard grey rain off the water

places.label: Bavaria
places.sensoryCue: woodsmoke, cold mountain wind, and the smell of fermenting hops

places.label: South Africa
places.sensoryCue: dry veld dust, hot sun, and a language that is not quite Dutch

places.label: the West Coast
places.sensoryCue: orange light, ocean fog, and the rattle of prospectors' pans

places.label: the East Coast
places.sensoryCue: coal smoke, harbor brine, and the clamor of a port city

places.label: Baghdad
places.sensoryCue: desert heat and distant shouts from a market stall on the Tigris

places.label: Canada
places.sensoryCue: pine resin, river ice breaking, and the chill of a northern dawn

places.label: the American Midwest
places.sensoryCue: turned earth, grain dust, and a wind that crosses a thousand miles of prairie

places.label: the American South
places.sensoryCue: humid heat, magnolia, and the slow cadence of a river delta
